title: HI-TACK Hot Glue Melt Gun, Fine Tip, Rapid Heat, High Temperature, DIY, Art, Craft, Repairs, Cards - 10-20 Watt Cordless
features: Cord-Free Convenience: Enjoy hassle-free crafting with the HI-TACK Rechargeable Glue Gun. No cables needed while in use, giving you complete freedom of movement for all your DIY projects.
Fast Heating & Ready in Seconds: This glue gun heats up quickly, allowing you to start your projects in seconds. It fully charges in just 1.5 hours, keeping you prepared for any task.
Versatile and Multi-Use: Perfect for toys, models, decorations, woodworking, artificial flowers, and crafts. This glue gun is your ideal companion for all your creative projects.
Includes 6 High-Quality Glue Sticks: Comes with six 7mm glue sticks to get you started right away. Enjoy smooth, strong bonds that work on a variety of materials and surfaces.
Ergonomic Design for Easy Handling: Lightweight and easy to handle, this glue gun provides comfort during extended use, allowing for precise application and control on all your crafting projects.
description: From the manufacturer Perfect For: Making or mending toys & models DIY home repairs & woodwork Handmade gifts & seasonal decorations Card making and fixing gift wrap embellishments Floral arrangements & artifical flower projects Quick fixes and crafting whilst travelling Craft classes, studio work & hobby meetings Start crafting right out of the box with 6 glue melt sticks included! 10-20W Cordless Hot Glue Gun Craft Like a Pro with the MG200! The perfect companion for crafters, DIY enthusiasts, and hobbyists alike. Designed for precision, performance and ease-of-use, this compact and rechargeable tool is ideal for everything from intricate crafts to household repairs. Cordless & Rechargeable Rapid Heat-Up High-Temp Performance Battery Indicator Lights Easy squeeze, smooth action trigger Enjoy complete freedom of movement with USB-C recharging (1.5m cable included). Heats up ready to use in just 15–25 seconds, so you can jump straight into your project. Strong, durable, waterproof bonding for a wide range of materials including wood, fabric, plastic, artificial flowers and more. Designed with convenience in mind, the MG200 cordless glue gun delivers fast acting, high-performance heat with portable power, whether you're at your crafting table, working in the studio or in the garden shed.
